case_title: WANG CHAN U VS. TAO T. FAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,499.00 FILED BY CHAN U, WANG AS TO DEFENDANT FAN, TAO T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HESRING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY CHAN U, WANG FAN, TAO T.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. TO AUG-14-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT.506. TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE NO. 824933. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-10-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO PROPERLY SERVE THE DEFENDANT WHO IS NOT PRESENT, HOWEVER HIS WIFE APPEARS. BOTH PARTIES ARE TO RETURN WITH INTERPRETERS. PLAINTIFF GIVEN INFORMATION FOR ACCESS BY THE MEDIATOR. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAO T. FAN NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT AS TO MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT FAN, TAO T.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN U, WANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FAN, TAO T. PLAINTIFF IS NOT A LICENSED CONTRACTOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-12-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FAN, TAO T.
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO TAO T. FAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2008 - JUDGMENT.
